mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations and compress corporate profit margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger immediate equity sell-offs over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns remain positive in > 55% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.2pp, or signal shows no predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms synchronized consumer demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter through earnings revisions.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both positive MoM
failure_condition: Joint positive MoM signals in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production indices reflect supply chain normalization and capacity utilization improvements, generating positive equity returns over the next month when inflation expectations are anchored.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 20-day returns during disinflationary periods, or the signal reverses direction when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 5% annually.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.6% triggers immediate risk-off positioning as markets price in prolonged central bank tightening, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are non-negative in > 60% of high-inflation trigger months, or rolling predictive accuracy falls below 50% baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms labor market tightness that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-UNRATE signal shows no statistically significant correlation with 60-day forward returns, or the interaction term loses predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that translates into higher corporate revenues and profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show zero or negative correlation with 20-day forward returns across multiple business cycles, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 in rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month industrial production decline exceeding 0.5% signals acute supply chain disruptions or demand collapse that triggers immediate equity deleveraging over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns remain positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO drops > 0.5%, or the threshold signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark in walk-forward validation.
